_schema.comment: Hidden quests revealed by NPCs only when player rep passes the threshold. Each quest has a delivery_mode that determines the narrative framing of the reveal.

quests.title: The Rider Who Did Not Desert
quests.hook: There's a rider who went missing three weeks ago. Official story says he deserted. The Captain doesn't believe it. Neither do I.
quests.location_hint: Last seen near the Varkhon Rise windstones

quests.title: The Amber Foal
quests.hook: The glowing foal at Zhoraven Ring -- its kin-sense signature is something no Pasua trainer has seen. Something is coming into the world through that animal. We need to know what.

quests.title: The Deeper Silence
quests.hook: A Wind-Rider scout I trust told me the silence south of the Breach has grown wider this moon. Something down there is waking that should stay asleep. I need eyes I trust in those tunnels.

quests.title: A Sibling Lost
quests.hook: We have reason to believe a Silentborn who grew up outside the breeding program is living in Liraveth, unaware of what she is. The Spur Tower is hunting her. We need to reach her first.

quests.appointment_text: before dawn, when Custos is quiet
quests.title: The Spur's Archive, Stolen
quests.hook: My sources say the Dark Dwarf lore-keeper inside the Spur Tower is the only reason the Shattered Host still knows its own history. End her, and the House Leader's line loses its foundation.
quests.location_hint: Deepwater Marches -- the Spur Tower archive level

quests.title: Hit the Unstrung Tonight
quests.hook: You. The Unstrung are running goods up the Riverwind tonight. Take six of the company and put a stop to it. You'll find them at the Heights -- bring their Philosopher's head in a sack.

quests.title: The Grove That Went Silent
quests.hook: There's a stand of black-oak in the deep Tidewoods that has gone wrong. The trees won't speak to us. If you are what I think you are, walk with me there and see what I have seen.
There's a factor in Liraveth moving Dómnathar trinkets through our river routes under my House's seal. I need it stopped, and I need the seal back, and I can't be seen asking for either.
quests.title: The Seal That Was Copied
The Ember Vault Seal
quests.hook: The old forge-seal beneath Kharazhad is failing. My warrior-kin will not admit it. If the fire below wakes fully, it will not stop at our city. Take my blessing and go below in my place.

quests.title: The Artifact Beneath My City
quests.hook: There is a Deceiver artifact in my city's lava-tubes. I know who put it there and why. I cannot be the one to recover it. You will be. Bring it to me. Tell no one, and kill anyone who asks.
